heading: Standards for approval of tribal payments; United States not liable for distribution of funds; continuing responsibility under other provisions
label: 117c Standards for approval of tribal payments; United States not liable for distribution of funds; continuing responsibility under other provisions

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary shall, by regulation, establish reasonable standards for the approval of tribal payments pursuant to and, where approval is given under such regulations, the United States shall not be liable with respect to any distribution of funds by a tribe under sections 117a to 117c of this title.section 117a of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Nothing in sections 117a to 117c of this title shall otherwise absolve the United States from any other responsibility to the Indians, including those which derive from the trust relationship and from any treaties, Executive orders, or agreements between the United States and any Indian tribe.
